narrative:
Greenfield Township has 998 registered voters, with 47.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.7 percentage points.
